title: xyris brevifolia
intro: Xyris brevifolia, also known as Yellow-eyed grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Xyridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Xyris brevifolia is also used to treat digestive issues, including diarrhea and dysentery, and has been traditionally used to lower fever. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
